titleStmt.title: SII 15.62: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 62. (B.K. No. 39 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a beam in the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.

The record is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Krōdhi, Pushya śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. In the said cyclic year the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa occurred on Pushya ba. 5 which corresponds to 1184 A.D., December 24, Monday. See No. 61 above.

It records a gift of gold out of the income from his smithy made in the presence of the One-Thousand by Ayachi-śeṭṭi, a devotee of the god Prasanna-Kēśava, at the exhortation of Guṇanidhi Kēśavadēva, for worship and offerings to the god Asitara Kēśavāditya. A few more gifts to the same temple are also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrimaccāḷukyacakrava¨rtti sōmēsvaradēvava¨rṣada 3 neya krōdhi saṁvatsarada puśya su 5 Ā Uttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa byatīpātadaṁdu vinayasaṁvaṁnanuṁ prasaṁnakēsavadēva pādārādhakanumappiyaciseṭṭi Asitara kēsavādityadēvaraṁgabhōga
vācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluvaṁtāgi taṁna hiriyakkasālada kēṇiyalu śrīsāsi¨rbbara sannidhānadalu śrīguṇanidhi kēsavadēvana vacanōktiyiṁ biṭṭa haṇa 5 mattavā kaṁmaṭadalu naḍavāṇikāra mahādēvaseṭṭiyaru koṭṭa
haṇa 2 mattavā kaṁmaṭada potthagrāhaka pāṁḍavara biṭṭarasaṁ dhūpakke biṭṭapaṇa 2 mattaṁ tā kaṁmaṭada hiriya sēnabhōgaṁ mādhavadēvaṁ biṭṭa paṇa 1 Intī sāsanamā¨rgadalā rādaḍaṁ hiriyakkasālavaṁ koṁḍa kēṇikāṟanā kaṁmaṭadāṇikāṟanā pottha
grāhakanalliya sēnabōvaniṁtinibaruṁ taṁtaṁma dha¨rmmavāgācaṁdrapa¨ryyaṁta naḍasuvaru . naḍasidava¨rgge gaṁge gaye vāraṇāsiyalu sahasra kavileymaṁ sahasra brāhmaṇa¨rggitta phala vakku yellā tī¨rtthaṁgaḷalā kavileymanā viprara vadhiysidātanakku .
Digital edition of SII 15.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
